title: Missing topics management page with navigation handler
purpose: Displays a list of missing topics requested by users and provides navigation to create new topics. Used as a dedicated route page for topic management.
module_context: Exports a React functional component MissingTopicsPage that wraps MissingTopicsView with layout and header. Includes a navigation callback prop for creating new topics.

steps.content: Accept props including optional navigation callback and class name.
Define a callback function to handle creating new topics.
IF a navigation callback is provided, use it to navigate to the editor.
ELSE use default browser navigation to the new topic page with pre-filled name.
Render the page layout with header and missing topics view.
Pass the create topic handler to the missing topics view component.
Check if a navigation callback is available.
IF the callback exists, invoke it with the topic name.
ELSE navigate to the new topic editor page with the topic name encoded in the URL.
